slides.title: STOCKY AI
slides.subtitle: AI Trading Infrastructure for India
slides.notes: Logo wordmark in gold (#C9A96E), subtitle in white, tagline in secondary gray

slides.title: The Problem
slides.headline: Trading is not a skill problem. It's an information problem.
bullets: 91% of retail F&O traders lose money — SEBI FY25
₹1.05 lakh crore aggregate losses in one year
Institutions hold edge in data & compute → extract money from retail
Only 2% profitable traders are Indian; rest are foreign institutions extracting capital
slides.notes: Headline in large gold text. Bullets below in white. Source citation in small gray at bottom.

slides.title: Two Theses

columns.label: Thesis 1
columns.title: Democratize Data & Compute
columns.description: Give retail traders the same intelligence layer that hedge funds have.

columns.label: Thesis 2
columns.title: Make Trading Fun
columns.description: Replace doomscrolling with dopamine-driven, AI-assisted trading.

slides.notes: Two columns with a converging arrow/line to 'Stocky AI' at bottom center

slides.title: Stocky Terminal — India's Bloomberg
slides.subtitle: Global Intelligence Dashboard (God's Eye View)
bullets: Live ship & flight tracking, supply chain disruptions
Macro: wars, FED news, regulatory changes
slides.notes: Left side: bullets in a bordered box. Right side: '+AI' callout. Bottom: screenshot placeholder.

slides.title: Edge in Action
slides.subtitle: Data no one sees → Trades no one makes

trades.title: La Niña → NFL Fertilizers
steps: Monitored abnormally cool sea surface temperatures in the Pacific Ocean
Identified La Niña pattern → strong monsoons → boosted agriculture & fertilizer demand
NFL rose ~30% from June 2024 in 2 months

trades.title: Iran / Strait of Hormuz → Polymarket
steps: US struck Iran at 06:15 UTC on February 28, 2026
Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz at 07:15 UTC
First media report at 15:52 UTC (~8 hours later)
We tracked real-time AIS shipping & satellite data, detecting the closure early
Leveraged edge to bet on Polymarket, generating 75% alpha

slides.notes: Two trade case studies side by side. Each with title, result badge, and step bullets. Image placeholders below each.

slides.title: Stocky Fun — Trading as a Game
bullets: RMG banned Aug 2025 → $2.5B displaced gambling capital needs a new platform
App open → trade open → close in 15–30 mins
Social capital: gamified UX, social trading, share PnL
Replace a 15-min Instagram reel session with trading
Real-time vision API to signal the next move (up or down)
slides.callout: No. of trades ↑  Trade duration ↓  →  Brokerage ↑  Loss ↓
slides.notes: Bullets left, screenshot placeholder right. Callout bar at bottom.

slides.title: Competitive Landscape
slides.headline: Everyone else uses ChatGPT API keys + VC money to subsidize. We have our own fine-tuned model with proven results.
differentiators: No competitor has a live, verified trading track record
No competitor has proprietary data infrastructure (satellite, shipping, weather)
No competitor integrates data → AI → execution end-to-end
slides.notes: 2×2 matrix with Stocky AI in top-right (gold star). Competitors plotted in other quadrants. Three differentiator bullets below.
